name: InlineQueryResultCachedVoice
description: Represents a link to a voice message stored on the Telegram servers. By default, this voice message will be sent by the user. Alternatively, you can use input_message_content to send a message with the specified content instead of the voice message.

fields.name: type
fields.description: Type of the result, must be voice

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for this result, 1-64 bytes

fields.name: voice_file_id
fields.description: A valid file identifier for the voice message

fields.name: parse_mode
fields.description: Mode for parsing entities in the voice message caption. See formatting options for more details.

fields.name: caption_entities
fields.description: List of special entities that appear in the caption, which can be specified instead of parse_mode

fields.name: reply_markup
fields.description: Inline keyboard attached to the message

fields.name: input_message_content
fields.description: Content of the message to be sent instead of the voice message
